message:
test: add robot-mode API conformance and contract tests (bd-2gkx.6)

Add doc parser unit tests that extract endpoints from docs/robot-mode-api.md
and verify they match route registrations, detecting doc drift. Also add
E2E contract tests validating response envelope structure, HATEOAS links,
error format, correlation headers, OpenAPI spec availability, and triage
endpoint conformance.

14 unit tests + 14 E2E contract tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
